basicInfo.name: Nightmare Bella
basicInfo.flavor: Bella grew stronger by continuously consuming blood. She rose to become the Queen of Lamia.

Normal Attack.desc:
Single Enemy
 - Deals damage equal to 90% of Magic Attack 1 time(s).
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 90% of Physical Attack.

Skill 1.name: Lamia's Fang
Skill 1.desc:
Single Enemy
 - Deals damage equal to 245% of Magic Attack 1 time(s).
 - 100% chance to inflict Paralysis. [Duration: 3 Turn(s)]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 245% of Physical Attack.

Skill 2.name: Spread Fear
Skill 2.desc:
All Enemies
 - 100% chance to inflict Damage Reduction [Duration: 3 Turn(s)]
 - 100% chance to inflict Paralysis. [Duration: 3 Turn(s)]

Passive.name: Lamia's Secret Art
Passive.desc:
All Enemies
 - 100% chance to inflict Effect Resist Reduction. [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]

profile.story: A lamia living in Dragon Ruins that serves the gorgon Cleo.\nShe's known to use her looks to lure men in, then drink their blood to obtain their magic power.\nShe's well aware that the lizardman Jak has fallen for her, but cordially rejects him every time. She would like to be more forceful, but she doesn't want lizardman-lamia relations to suffer as a result.
